action_choice_hints: Action cell is in the same row or column as a cell with a special role token.
Action cell is the nearest cell with a particular role along a direction from another key token.
Action cell is adjacent to or within a small radius of a cell with a specific role.
There exists a contiguous path of certain role tokens connecting the action cell to another region or object.
Action cell is not blocked by obstacles when moving along a straight line from a reference cell.
Action cell is in a region above, below, left, or right of a key token, relative to its position.
feature_family_hints: Relative position features: Needed to capture whether the action cell is aligned or positioned with respect to other key tokens (e.g., same row/column, above/below).
Local neighborhood features: Required to determine if the action cell is adjacent to or near cells with specific roles.
Connectivity features: Necessary to model whether the action cell is part of a contiguous structure or path of certain role tokens.
Directional proximity features: Needed to express if the action cell is the nearest or first encountered cell with a role along a direction from a reference point.
Obstacle-aware path features: Required to check if a path from a reference cell to the action cell is unblocked by obstacles.
